title: §0Water Me Down
lines: Don't you water me down, down, down, down
Don't you water me down, down, down, down
Not enough therapy to make me close my eyes
I'd rather lose control than keep it inside
Don't you water me down, down, down, down
I've been lying to myself
I feel stranger when they're all around
There's nobody in this world, nobody I know
Who ain't dyin' just to play a part
Struggling to my feet
Still jaded, heart breaking into pieces
They say, "You come with me"
Not waking up
Don't you water me down, down, down, down
Don't you water me down, down, down, down
Not enough therapy to make me close my eyes
I'd rather lose control than keep it inside
Don't you water me down, down, down, down
Don't you water me down, down, down, down
Not enough therapy to make me close my eyes
There ain't no other words that can change my mind
Don't you water me down, down, down, down
I'm relying on myself
I don't care what makes them safe and sound
I'm done waiting for the proof
I'm done waiting for help
There's no question that we're in the dark
Not enough to believe
Not waiting 'til there a lot of reasons
They say, "It's only me"
Still waking up
Don't you water me down, down, down, down
Don't you water me down, down, down, down
Not enough therapy to make me close my eyes
I'd rather lose control than keep it inside
Don't you water me down, down, down, down
Don't you water me down, down, down, down
Not enough therapy to make me close my eyes
There ain't no other words that can change my mind
